summary: Full backend + frontend validation of Hultech Norwegian site. All 9 backend pytest cases pass (root, health, POST/GET /api/contact incl. validation). Frontend: hero, nav (desktop + mobile hamburger), services (5), why-Hultech (5), about, footer, contact form success flow, Emergent badge hidden, mobile-390px no horizontal overflow — ALL OK. One minor UX deviation: empty-submit shows browser's native HTML5 tooltip (English 'Please fill out this field') instead of the custom Norwegian toast 'Navn og melding er påkrevd.' because inputs use required but form has no noValidate. The custom toast logic itself is correct (verified after removing required).

ui_bugs.issue: Empty-submit shows browser native HTML5 validation tooltip (English) instead of custom Norwegian Sonner toast 'Navn og melding er påkrevd.' Inputs have required attribute; form has no noValidate, so the JS-level toast.error never runs.

action_items: Fix Contact form validation UX: add noValidate to <form> (or drop the HTML5 required attributes on name/message). Either approach lets the custom Norwegian toast 'Navn og melding er påkrevd.' display as designed and matches the spec.
critical_code_review_comments: Contact.jsx mixes HTML5 'required' with JS-level toast validation; only one path will fire — pick one (recommend noValidate + JS toast for full Norwegian UX).

server.py list_contact_messages returns response_model=List[ContactMessage] but POST returns ContactMessageResponse; consider unifying or exposing email_configured in the GET listing too for admin clarity (low priority).
RESEND_API_KEY empty path is handled gracefully (logged + email_sent=false) — good.
MongoDB _id is correctly excluded via projection {"_id": 0} in GET /api/contact — verified, no leakage.

CORS allow_origins='*' with allow_credentials=True is technically invalid per CORS spec (browsers will reject credentialed requests). Currently no credentialed requests are made, so non-blocking, but consider tightening for prod.
test_credentials: n/a — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Test contact messages prefixed TEST_ inserted via POST /api/contact during pytest run and frontend success-flow test (one Playwright submission). Persisted in MongoDB collection contact_messages.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_hultech_api.py (9 cases). Frontend has full data-testid coverage; primary public URL via REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Only outstanding bug is HTML5 vs custom-toast validation in Contact.jsx — verify after fix by clicking submit on an empty form and asserting Sonner toast contains 'Navn og melding er påkrevd.'
rca of the issue: Contact form has both <input required> and a JS guard `if (!form.name.trim() || !form.message.trim()) toast.error(...)`. Browsers run native required validation BEFORE submit handler, so the JS toast never fires for empty submit. Fix: add noValidate to <form data-testid='contact-form' noValidate> (or remove required attributes). Reproduction: scroll to #contact, click submit-button on empty form → browser shows English 'Please fill out this field'. Mitigation verified: after JS-removing required attributes, the toast 'Navn og melding er påkrevd.' appears correctly.
